rows.indexdef: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX competitions_pkey ON public.competitions USING btree (id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX competitions_public_id_key ON public.competitions USING btree (public_id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX competitions_slug_key ON public.competitions USING btree (slug)
CREATE INDEX idx_competitions_category ON public.competitions USING btree (category_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_competitions_featured ON public.competitions USING btree (featured_at DESC) WHERE (is_featured = true)
CREATE INDEX idx_competitions_scheduled_publish ON public.competitions USING btree (scheduled_publish_at) WHERE ((scheduled_publish_at IS NOT NULL) AND (published_at IS NULL))
CREATE INDEX idx_competitions_status ON public.competitions USING btree (competition_status)
